chapters.title: Chapter 1 Siberian Wilderness
chapters.description: We begin our adventure in the Siberian wilderness, where Black plays ...e6, Nc6, Qc7 and Nf6. Learn White's attacking plan and Black's defensive setup.

chapters.title: Chapter 2 The Scheveningens
chapters.description: In Chapters 2 and 3, Black establishes the small but stable e6/d6 central pawn duo that resembles the Scheveningen structure, one of Black's most sturdy and flexible defensive systems in the Open Sicilian.

chapters.title: Chapter 3 The Scheveningens II
chapters.description: In Chapters 2 and 3, Black establishes the small but stable e6/d6 central pawn duo that resembles the Scheveningen structure, one of Black's most sturdy and flexible defensive systems in the Open Sicilian.

chapters.title: Chapter 4 Into the Deep
chapters.description: Prepare yourself as we take the plunge into some of the deepest waters found in the Morra Gambit, where Black plays ...e6, a6 and b5 followed by Bb7.

chapters.title: Chapter 6 Slaying the Dragon
chapters.description: Strap on your armor as we ride off to explore the Dragon variation of the Morra Gambit. Black intends to fianchetto his bishop and achieve the Dragon formation.

chapters.title: Chapter 7 The Professional's Choice - Nge7
chapters.description: After ...Nge7, Black plans to refute the gambit via ...Ng6, Be7 and O-O. The gambiteer halts Black's development with Bg5.

chapters.title: Chapter 8 Early Bishop Out - Nge7 II
chapters.description: Only after ...Bc5/Bb4 does Black aim for ...Nge7 and O-O, rendering Bg5 less effective. The gambiteer must pull out a few more creative gadgets from his briefcase.

chapters.title: Chapter 9 Taylor's Temple of Doom
chapters.description: In Taylor's treacherous Temple of Morra Doom, after ...Nc6, d6, a6 and Nf6, Black threatens to dissolve White's activity with ...Bg4 and Ne5.

chapters.title: Chapter 12 Morra Declined Potpourri
chapters.description: Compare Smith-Morra declined structures and early deviations. Study how White deals with miscellaneous Black responses.

chapters.title: Chapter 13 Morra-Maroczy
chapters.description: The "Maroczy Bind" is set up against 3...d3. Notice White's move order: prophylactic h3 preventing ...Bg4/Ng4, and Nc3 after ...Nf6, avoiding ...Bxc3.
